belongs_to_collection.name: If You Don't Want To Be Gang-raped, Try To Guess Your Husband's Dick.

response.original_title: JUR-604 輪姦されたくなかったら旦那のチ〇ポ当てて見ろ。沖宮那美
response.overview: "It's okay if I'm wrong... Just keep going inside me." Nami was happy with her comfortable life with her husband. However, her husband had unknowingly accumulated a large debt through gambling, and one day he was kidnapped by a group of ruthless men. If she couldn't repay the debt, her husband wouldn't be released. The men then proposed a gamble to Nami. "If you want your husband back, try to guess which dick is his," they said... And so, blindfolded, Nami was forced to endure the dicks of unknown men, and among them, her husband's dick. In this brutal gamble where she absolutely could not afford to lose, Nami gradually began to let out sighs...
response.title: JUR-604 If You Don't Want To Be Gang-raped, Try To Guess Your Husband's Dick. Nami Okimiya
